_README: Edit this file to publish self-paced modules. Then run: python3 build-modules.py  — it regenerates every module page AND the index grid. To publish a module, set 'status' to 'live' and fill in youtube/pdf/audio. Leave 'status' as 'coming_soon' for unpublished ones. You never need to touch the HTML files directly.

_fields.title: Module title, e.g. 'Mastering S3 Storage Classes'
_fields.subtitle: One short theme line
_fields.date: Publish date, e.g. '6 Jun 2026' (leave blank if coming soon)
_fields.week: Which bootcamp week this maps to (1-4)
_fields.youtube: YouTube video ID only — the part after ?v= (e.g. 'dQw4w9WgXcQ')
_fields.pdf: PDF filename placed in the module folder (e.g. 'module-01-notes.pdf'), or blank
_fields.audio: Audio filename placed in the module's audio/ folder (e.g. 'module-01.mp3'), or blank
_fields.description: Longer paragraph for the About section
